mapper.select: SELECT id, reporter_user, reported_user, content_type, content_ref, reason, status, moderator_user, decision_notes, penalty_type, penalty_ends_at, created_at, resolved_at FROM content_report WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, reporter_user, reported_user, content_type, content_ref, reason, status, moderator_user, decision_notes, penalty_type, penalty_ends_at, created_at, resolved_at FROM content_report WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE content_report SET status = #{status}, moderator_user = #{moderatorUser}, decision_notes = #{decisionNotes}, penalty_type = #{penaltyType}, penalty_ends_at = #{penaltyEndsAt}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'OPEN'
